text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nothing! But thanks to the time off you gave me,
I was able to buy a ticket to an Umamusume
event!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It'll be jam-packed with stuff like an interactive
panel with games and a small performance... It's
gonna be the best!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... Just thinking about it is getting me so
excited, I can't sit still! I need to burn some of this
energy right away! What should we do today,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Agnes Digital had a fulfilling break,
and thanks to that, she's filled to the seams with
energy.
